author: lOrm
content: Refactor complete. Entry point shrunk from ~110 LOC to 51 LOC. Helpers now: resolve_provider (sync, lookup), bump_session_request_count (async), transform_and_forward (async), record_actual_usage (async) — plus pre-existing record_turn_estimate, apply_vdd_review, compact_request_context from prior partial fix. Verification: 1135 lib tests pass (matches baseline), clippy --all-targets --all-features adds zero new errors (only pre-existing kill.rs:35 remains), rustfmt --check clean on src/proxy.rs. No allow/ignore/clippy.toml. Behavior preserved.
